title: Engagements
subtitle: Unified view of your work with SmartPRO — PRO, government cases, bookings, contracts, and billing.

clientWorkspace.engagementsSubtitle: Everything you need from SmartPRO in one place.
clientWorkspace.dashboardSubtitle: What needs attention and what to do next.
clientWorkspace.invoicesSubtitle: PRO and client-service invoices linked to engagements.
clientWorkspace.teamSubtitle: People with access to this workspace.
clientWorkspace.engagementsEmptyClient: No engagements match this view yet. Try another filter or check back when there is new work.
clientWorkspace.welcomeBody: Next: invite your team from Team (optional), or open Engagements when SmartPRO shares work with you.

onboarding.title: Set up your workspace
onboarding.subtitle: Create a company to use your SmartPRO client workspace. Engagements, documents, and billing will appear here once your workspace exists.
onboarding.step1Body: Add your organization so SmartPRO can link engagements, invoices, and messages to the right account.
onboarding.step2Body: After your company exists, invite colleagues from Team or company access settings.
onboarding.step3Body: When your workspace is ready, open Engagements for active work, or use Messages and Documents from the sidebar.

empty: No engagements yet. Use “Link existing records” to import from your workspace, or continue using the client portal tabs.
nextBlocked: This engagement is blocked — contact your SmartPRO account manager.
nextSignContract: A contract is awaiting your signature. Open the signing flow from the Contracts tab or the link provided when available.
nextPayInvoice: An invoice is outstanding. Use payment instructions from your account manager or the billing summary below.
nextDefault: Review tasks and messages below for the latest updates.
noMessages: No messages on this engagement yet.
portalWidgetEmpty: No engagements yet — link your workspace records.

ops.title: Engagements control tower
ops.subtitle: Operational queue: prioritize work, assign owners, and close the loop.

instructionsPlaceholder: Bank name, IBAN, reference to use…
